module.name: wxPython
build-commands: cd wxPython; /app/bin/python setup.py WXPORT=gtk3 UNICODE=1 BUILD_GLCANVAS=0 EP_ADD_OPTS=1 EP_FULL_VER=0 NO_SCRIPTS=1 WX_CONFIG="/app/bin/wx-config --prefix=/app --no_rpath" SYS_WX_CONFIG="wx-config --version=3.0.2.0 --toolkit=gtk3 --static=no" build_ext --rpath=/app/lib build

cd wxPython; /app/bin/python setup.py WXPORT=gtk3 UNICODE=1 BUILD_GLCANVAS=0 EP_ADD_OPTS=1 EP_FULL_VER=0 NO_SCRIPTS=1 WX_CONFIG="/app/bin/wx-config --prefix=/app --no_rpath" SYS_WX_CONFIG="wx-config --version=3.0.2.0 --toolkit=gtk3 --static=no --unicode" build_ext --rpath=/app/lib install --root=/
